Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Mantle of Souls
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 1
STR: -5 STA: -5 INT: +10 MANA: +75
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: NEC
Race: ERU
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:unknown
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 09:58:30
Page Updated:Sun Aug 18th, 2019

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 50
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Azraxs' Legacy


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Ouch !
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2003 at 10:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592793216801
14 posts
Well she caught me by surprise. I was near hear spawn point helping a pally-friend out with his newbie armor quest, looking for Giant Sylvan Bats in the area, when out of the blue she popped, rooted me and threw 2-3 dot's on me. Me being a lvl 49 SK and she conning DB to me took this as a challenge. I HT'ed her, gave her my best DD and DOT and watch how she slowly fell down to around 70% hp.. At that point she had brought me down to 30% !! Ouch !! ... As soon as the roots fell off, i fled. DOT'ted i quicke got down to 25%, then 20%, 15% - One DOT left, 10%, 6% - Last DOT fades, 4% ..... phew. Last DOT gone. At 4% you just dont run that fast and I was sure she'd DD me or simply root me again, but somehow I managed to get to the PoK book and save my puny life before that happened. I reckon she has a certain area she'll never leave otherwise I should've been toast. Druid or Cleric company is HIGHLY recommended for any NEC around my level. She's a tough lady !

/Cop
▲ Page top
Alania Peaceheart
QuoteReply
# May 19 2003 at 12:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251223980
View User Forum
36 posts
her name as Alania Peaceheart not alicia lol btw
drop "heart of a pure druid"or something along that lol forget exactlly wat its called
also drops a combine greatstaff

she spawed right where the wasp spawns

now only piece left toget is the Bloody Mantle from DA

but first gotta lvl a few more times


Recnam Orcena lvl 48 necro (eci).
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 25 2002 at 7:43 PM, Rating: Unrated, (Expand Post) i should now somethings about necro PVP since i kill them alot . erudites Def. die faster and are a joy to kill
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 04 2002 at 10:48 AM, Rating: Unrated, (Expand Post) Makes racial slams (even in jest) and can't spell the products right. Sad.
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 20 2002 at 6:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) First off to those who tout the lizards, as the superior necros, you just show your ignorance of the class. I would love to see you try to regain a significant amount of mana during a fight. Besides i would love to tap those extra hp off of you during a duel.
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 13 2002 at 6:41 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why is that worng? You upset someone got a better item then you? little ******
Druid Heart
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2001 at 11:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766061193
9 posts
Ok guys. Finally killed Alicia. Just a quick FYI, she didnt spawn where the wasp spawns. She actually spawned a little bit behind where the wasp spawns. Only reason why I found out was cause I brought a tracker friend with me. Nukes pretty good, close to 300. I have around 70% MR and she got me for 288 just so you know. She resisted me a few times, but be sure to dispell her cause she will make lunch me out of your pet if you dont. Big mistake the first time on my part. Had to zone with like 40 HP left hehe. Well, now I only got the Dark Assassin left. will keep you posted.

-Xezbeth
▲ Page top
RE: Druid Heart
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2002 at 2:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771472499
View User Forum
2 posts
OK I just killed her too and she spawned exactly where the wasp spawns. I left me pet to Guard that LOC and when she poped she imediately went for my pet and he took aggro. I managed to get all my dots on her and then fear broke and she rooted my pet and ran up to me and started whacking me pretty good! On my 3rd try i got fear off which was good cause i was a little below 1 Bulb of HP. The DOTs did ther job cause she went down as she ran away. Now hopefully i can solo the dark assisian at lvl 53. Anyone solo the assisian if so tell me details.

Dekaxx Vanfrhytan
Level 53 Necro
Terris-Thule
▲ Page top
RE: Druid Heart
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2002 at 12:01 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591779950885
3 posts
Soloed this guy today in Feerrott, was across the bridge that leads to Rathe Mts. Started with Root, then dooming darkness.. He reisted both a couple times and root doesnt last long on him, but its possible to do. Splurted, Pyro, Ebolt, Plague, and repeated. I recasted darkness a few times, because without it he runs faster than jboots and backstabs for like 500. He normal hits for about 150, and around there so make sure he's rooted and your at max casting range incase root goes. I didnt try to fearkite him, but im guessing its possible - but expect some resists. Also i was lvl 60 when killing him, GL to you all

Generall
Lvl 60 Necro
Tribunal
▲ Page top
Found Peacehart last night wandering around
QuoteReply
# May 26 2001 at 4:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749804966
1 post
I was looking for her spawn point when all of a sudden I saw a druid running around, and sure enough it was her. She then charged me, I Defluxed once, Darkened then feared. While she was running around, I summoned my Invoke Death pet since it has way more hp's than Minions of Shadows. Not even ready for her I was scrambling to find Annul Magic so my pet wouldn't take damage from her shield. Took around 2 minutes or so and she went down, no faction hit whatsoever, and she dropped a Combine Staff and her heart.

Off to Paineel now to work on raising my faction to kindly.

Emortalia Darkhart
55 Defiler of Xegony
▲ Page top
RE: Found Peacehart last night wandering around

# Aug 17 2001 at 5:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766061193
9 posts
Everything that is posted on the quest above is correct. My only problem soo far is trying to get the druid of reknown is Alicia Peaceheart in Gfaydark, I cant get her to spawn. I have camped the Wasp, at the coordinates pos 1400 and pos 1200, who is suppose to be her place holder. I have camped her two nights straight for six hours straight and still no pop. All I get is the wasp every 30 minutes (PH pop rate). Can anyone who has killed her tell me how long it took for her to spawn?? Does she pop right where the wasp does? Any insight will be helpful.. Gonna go camp the DA on Tuesday with some friends. Hopefully he goes down without too much trouble..

people Erudite necromancers are choice one because faction is easier to get up can go into freport and can go into evil cits while having alot higher base int my necros base int is 142

# Jan 03 2002 at 8:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592339708574
Scholar
285 posts
Though I play an Erudite, I'd trade him for an Iksar any day. The HP regen is gold at higher levels when your HP/mana conversion spells chew you up faster than the prey you're hunting.
▲ Page top
RE: people
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2003 at 6:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591786572623
60 posts
sahmhane... r u absolutely sure u can play the class well? cuz i know i do, and as an erudite with **** poor regen the Lich series definately does NOT own me as it apparently owns u, i end up pulling faster to compensate for the drain

but that is just me and i could be horribly wrong (doubt it tho) g'day ;P
▲ Page top
RE: people
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2003 at 11:27 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591792177509
View User Forum
56 posts
WOW that was a pointless, yet rude post. To address the issue--whether or not you're so "super slick" that you chainpull without a care, it's a simple math issue: better regen means less medding, as well as fewer lifetaps, which means less mana spent gaining life and more spend on higher-damage spells. So from a straight mathematical viewpoint--skill aside--he/she was entirely right: more regen=better killing....as long as you are willing to put up with absolutely everyone hating you. I do, and I love my Iksar :)
▲ Page top

The Dark Assasin
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2001 at 11:41 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
We killed him with 4 lvl 50's, and i must say he was a VERY hard fight since he had a ton hitpoints. A druid, a necro, a monk, and a cleric.He also dropped a combine dagger (whoopiee).
▲ Page top
FYI on Dark Assasin
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2000 at 5:34 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I tried to kill him with a lvl 60 wizzie (I'm 46 necro) and we failed. Bonds of Force only lasts 2 mins at a time and he does outrun jboots. Not sure about SOW (which I had on). He has a lot of HPs and wizzie went OOM nuking. next time, I'll get a druid to ensnare and somebody to debuff MR. Then I'm going to try the necro debuff and DOT/ fear if I can/ CoB and tap

Tip (general): Anytime you can kite some meanie with high resists and lots of HPs, Lich or CoB, run around, med when you can and BoD or Vamp them to do your damage. keeps doing damage while keeping manna and health prety much nutual (you loose some Hp/manna if you don't med and you have <49, you gain HP/manna if you have Lich and BoD and you don't med)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 11 2000 at 11:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Baaaa
Great Quest
QuoteReply
# Dec 06 2000 at 6:04 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
With the help of several friends I completed this quest at level 19. This item is awesome, at least it is on Rallos Zek. The plus 10 int plus 75 mana is equal to 17 int at level 50 which is as good or better than most plains items.

The hardest part is killing the assasin but a group of 4 level 50s will easily take him out provided that you have either a druid, necro or shaman to help. Slowing him down is the key. Kite him. I found him in the goblin camp along the wall, he is there quite frequently.

Alania Peaceheart is the name of the Druid. You will need at least two level 50s or one plus pet to kill her. She hits REALLY hard and runs fast. She resists magic frequently. Wizards are a big help on this part. IC kills her in a couple of hits

Good Luck
Mortius
▲ Page top
